name: Foothold
briefing: Commander, your drop pod made it down in one piece - barely. A rival expedition has landed across the plateau and is already digging in. Deploy your Fabricator, raise a base around a Command Nexus, harvest the vire crystal fields, and field an army. Destroy their Command Nexus before they destroy yours.
objectives: Build a Command Nexus and establish your base
Harvest vire crystal to fund your war effort
